query:

VALUES (

  'Admin',
  'admin@lab.local',
  'local',
  'admin',

  '$2b$10$dhsEIMwbSfUql4TA2CYm8OwQvghKlop96V1LqBUs1GH66CYGed9Xy',

  NOW()
)

  passwordHash = '$2b$10$dhsEIMwbSfUql4TA2CYm8OwQvghKlop96V1LqBUs1GH66CYGed9Xy',
  isActive = 1;
